---
title: "vector_ingest.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/vector_ingest.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.97
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.68
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating VectorIngest, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import VectorIngest and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `VectorIngest`
- `__init__`
- `add_skill`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
